kind: ruling amendment (SC-0064 proposition_kind Group C consolidation, Marcia 2026-06-13)

edits.why: Marcia's Group-C ruling (option a): the levirate name-preservation formula's two halves consolidated to one neutral type. NAME_NOT_CUT_OFF failed the strip-to-type test (a full clause restating content); NAME_RAISED folded in with it since a neutral NAME_PRESERVED covers the raising too (keeping both would be redundant). NAME_RAISED + NAME_NOT_CUT_OFF retire (not promoted); NAME_PRESERVED promoted to proposition_kind under SC-0064 (P12 ruling log).
